---
title: "05. Sample Size & Power"
---

# Sample Size & Power {#sec-ch-05-power}

Sample-size and power calculations for the designs covered in the rest of the book â€” t-tests, ANOVA, regression, survival, diagnostic accuracy, equivalence and non-inferiority, sequential designs. Each method page includes the exact `pwr` or simulation call.

This chapter contains **30 method pages** and **2 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.qmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Effect Size: Cohen's d](effect-size-cohens-d.qmd) | `effect-size-cohens-d` |
| [Effect Size: Cohen's h](effect-size-cohens-h.qmd) | `effect-size-cohens-h` |
| [Effect Size: Eta-Squared](effect-size-eta-squared.qmd) | `effect-size-eta-squared` |
| [Minimum Detectable Effect](minimum-detectable-effect.qmd) | `minimum-detectable-effect` |
| [Post-Hoc Power: A Controversy](post-hoc-power-controversy.qmd) | `post-hoc-power-controversy` |
| [Power Analysis: Introduction](power-analysis-introduction.qmd) | `power-analysis-introduction` |
| [Power for Agreement (Kappa)](power-agreement-kappa.qmd) | `power-agreement-kappa` |
| [Power for Bland-Altman Studies](power-bland-altman.qmd) | `power-bland-altman` |
| [Power for Chi-Squared Tests](power-chi-squared.qmd) | `power-chi-squared` |
| [Power for Cluster-RCT](power-cluster-rct.qmd) | `power-cluster-rct` |
| [Power for Correlation Tests](power-correlation.qmd) | `power-correlation` |
| [Power for Cox Regression](power-cox-regression.qmd) | `power-cox-regression` |
| [Power for Crossover Trials](power-crossover.qmd) | `power-crossover` |
| [Power for Diagnostic Accuracy](power-diagnostic-accuracy.qmd) | `power-diagnostic-accuracy` |
| [Power for Equivalence (TOST)](power-equivalence-tost.qmd) | `power-equivalence-tost` |
| [Power for ICC](power-icc.qmd) | `power-icc` |
| [Power for Linear Regression](power-linear-regression.qmd) | `power-linear-regression` |
| [Power for Logistic Regression](power-logistic-regression.qmd) | `power-logistic-regression` |
| [Power for McNemar's Test](power-mcnemar.qmd) | `power-mcnemar` |
| [Power for Non-Inferiority Trials](power-non-inferiority.qmd) | `power-non-inferiority` |
| [Power for One-Proportion Test](power-one-proportion.qmd) | `power-one-proportion` |
| [Power for One-Sample t-Test](power-one-sample-t.qmd) | `power-one-sample-t` |
| [Power for One-Way ANOVA](power-anova.qmd) | `power-anova` |
| [Power for Paired t-Test](power-paired-t.qmd) | `power-paired-t` |
| [Power for Repeated-Measures ANOVA](power-repeated-measures.qmd) | `power-repeated-measures` |
| [Power for Stepped-Wedge Trials](power-stepped-wedge.qmd) | `power-stepped-wedge` |
| [Power for the Log-Rank Test](power-logrank-test.qmd) | `power-logrank-test` |
| [Power for Two-Proportion Test](power-two-proportions.qmd) | `power-two-proportions` |
| [Sample Size for a Two-Sample t-Test](power-two-sample-t.qmd) | `power-two-sample-t` |
| [Sample Size Sensitivity Analysis](sensitivity-analysis-sample-size.qmd) | `sensitivity-analysis-sample-size` |

## Labs

| # | Lab | Course / week / session |
|---|---|---|
| C1.20 | [Week 4, Session 5 â€” Sample size, power, and Quarto reporting](labs/lab-sample-size-power-and-quarto-reporting.qmd) | Course 1, week 4, session 5 |
| C3.5 | [Week 1, Session 5 â€” Power: closed-form and simulation](labs/lab-power-closed-form-and-simulation.qmd) | Course 3, week 1, session 5 |
